productDisplayName: Lotto Men Sneak Red Casual Shoes
description: lotto shoes - the one stop shop for quality footwear with optimal durability. This Sneak shoe with its laceless styling and padded inner is sure to become a closet favourite. Referenced from the skate and surf culture, but crafted for all comfort junkies, style this sockless with shorts; it's a perfect slip-on when you're in a hurry!UpperSynthetic upperReinforced overlay at the heel collarSlip on styleBrand logo embossed on the midfootPadded tongue with brandingPadded fabric innerMidsoleRubber midsole for impact protectionOutsoleWaffle patterned grooves on the outsole for grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
